screen.enthusia_autoclicker.title: Enthusia AutoClicker Settings
screen.enthusia_autoclicker.left_enabled: Enables automated left-click input while the autoclicker is running.
screen.enthusia_autoclicker.left_mode.to: Click presses attack at the selected interval. Hold keeps attack pressed.
screen.enthusia_autoclicker.left_interva: Ticks between left clicks. Decimals are allowed and the minimum is 12.5 ticks.
screen.enthusia_autoclicker.food_enabled: Pauses left clicking when hungry, eats food from the offhand, then resumes.
screen.enthusia_autoclicker.food_thresho: Starts eating when the food bar is at or below this value. Valid values are 1 through 19.
screen.enthusia_autoclicker.right_enable: Enables automated right-click input while the autoclicker is running.
screen.enthusia_autoclicker.right_mode.t: Click presses use at the selected interval. Hold keeps use pressed.
screen.enthusia_autoclicker.right_interv: Ticks between right clicks. Decimals are allowed and the minimum is 12.5 ticks.
screen.enthusia_autoclicker.run_duration: Stops the autoclicker after this many ticks. Use 0 to run until the keybind stops it.
screen.enthusia_autoclicker.status_messa: Shows enabled, disabled, and timer-complete messages above the hotbar.
screen.enthusia_autoclicker.durability_g: Stops the entire autoclicker before the damageable item in your main hand reaches the configured durability.
screen.enthusia_autoclicker.minimum_dura: Remaining durability that stops the autoclicker. Valid values are 1 through 10000.
screen.enthusia_autoclicker.armor_stand_: Allows offhand food use while targeting an armor stand, but only after the autoclicker has run continuously for 10 seconds. Hitboxes are not changed.
screen.enthusia_autoclicker.auto_restock: Uses normal inventory clicks to merge matching food into the offhand, or move another food stack when needed. Non-food offhand items are never replaced.
screen.enthusia_autoclicker.restock_at_c: Restocks when the offhand food stack reaches this count or lower. Valid values are 0 through 63.
screen.enthusia_autoclicker.stop_when_ou: Stops the autoclicker when hungry and no food is available to the offhand automation.
